mapper.select: SELECT * FROM student_answers WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM student_answers ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_answers (exam_record_id, exam_id, student_id, question_id, student_answer, correct_answer, is_correct, answer_time, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{examRecordId}, #{examId}, #{studentId}, #{questionId}, #{studentAnswer}, #{correctAnswer}, #{isCorrect}, #{answerTime}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE student_answers exam_record_id = #{examRecordId}, exam_id = #{examId}, student_id = #{studentId}, question_id = #{questionId}, student_answer = #{studentAnswer}, correct_answer = #{correctAnswer}, is_correct = #{isCorrect}, answer_time = #{answerTime}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_answers
SELECT * FROM student_answers WHERE exam_record_id = #{examRecordId}
SELECT * FROM student_answers WHERE exam_record_id = #{examRecordId} ORDER BY question_id
SELECT * FROM student_answers WHERE question_id = #{questionId}
SELECT * FROM student_answers WHERE exam_record_id = #{examRecordId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_answers WHERE exam_record_id = #{examRecordId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_answers WHERE question_id = #{questionId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_answers WHERE exam_record_id = #{examRecordId} AND is_correct = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_answers WHERE exam_record_id = #{examRecordId} AND is_correct = false
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_answers WHERE exam_record_id = #{examRecordId} AND (student_answer IS NULL OR student_answer = '')
SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN is_correct = true THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) FROM student_answers WHERE question_id = #{questionId} AND is_correct IS NOT NULL
SELECT * FROM student_answers WHERE exam_record_id = #{examRecordId} AND student_answer IS NOT NULL AND student_answer != ''
SELECT * FROM student_answers WHERE exam_record_id = #{examRecordId} AND (student_answer IS NULL OR student_answer = '')
SELECT * FROM student_answers WHERE exam_record_id = #{examRecordId} AND is_correct = true
SELECT * FROM student_answers WHERE exam_record_id = #{examRecordId} AND is_correct = false
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM student_answers WHERE exam_record_id = #{examRecordId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
SELECT * FROM student_answers WHERE answer_time >= #{startTime} AND answer_time <= #{endTime}
SELECT * FROM student_answers ORDER BY answer_time DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM student_answers WHERE exam_record_id = #{examRecordId} ORDER BY answer_time DESC
SELECT * FROM student_answers WHERE question_id = #{questionId} ORDER BY answer_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE student_answers SET student_answer = #{studentAnswer}, answer_time = #{answerTime}, updated_at = #{updateTime} WHERE exam_record_id = #{examRecordId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
UPDATE student_answers SET is_correct = #{isCorrect}, updated_at = #{updateTime} WHERE exam_record_id = #{examRecordId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
UPDATE student_answers SET correct_answer = #{correctAnswer}, updated_at = #{updateTime} WHERE exam_record_id = #{examRecordId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
UPDATE student_answers SET student_answer = NULL, answer_time = NULL, is_correct = NULL, updated_at = #{updateTime} WHERE exam_record_id = #{examRecordId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM student_answers WHERE exam_record_id = #{examRecordId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.select: SELECT student_answer, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM student_answers WHERE question_id = #{questionId} AND student_answer IS NOT NULL GROUP BY student_answer ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT sa.question_id, COUNT(sa.id) as total_answers, COUNT(CASE WHEN sa.is_correct = true THEN 1 END) as correct_answers, COUNT(CASE WHEN sa.is_correct = false THEN 1 END) as wrong_answers, COUNT(CASE WHEN sa.student_answer IS NULL OR sa.student_answer = '' THEN 1 END) as unanswered_count FROM student_answers sa WHERE sa.exam_record_id IN (SELECT er.id FROM exam_records er WHERE er.exam_id = #{examId}) GROUP BY sa.question_id
